context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the ecto-changeset-patterns instructions from the published Elixir Phoenix Skills plugin.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Never require foreign key fields in `cast_assoc` child changesets

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Always pair `unsafe_validate_unique` with `unique_constraint`

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Use `update_change/3` for field transformations (trim, downcase, slugify)

checklist.name: instruction-4
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Define separate named changesets** for each operation (registration, update, password change, etc.)

checklist.name: instruction-5
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Verify** by testing in `iex -S mix` or running your changeset tests. A quick iex smoke test:

checklist.name: instruction-6
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Always pair `unsafe_validate_unique` with `unique_constraint`:
